title: Iran’s threat to control the Strait of Hormuz is rattling oil markets: 'People are afraid'
summary_full: Oil markets fear Iran may impose fees on ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz as part of any peace deal with the U.S.
summary_public: Oil markets fear Iran may impose fees on ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz as part of any peace deal with the U.S.
